confirmed.title: Coachmark 鍵盤路徑機制性斷裂 — Tab 離開 trigger 即觸發 focus-outside dismiss,CTA 鍵盤永遠到不了
confirmed.detail: coachmark.tsx:170 `onOpenAutoFocus={(e) => e.preventDefault()}` 讓焦點停在 trigger(spec 明文的 documented 決策),但 code comment(L168-169)與 coachmark.spec.md L169/L206 宣稱「想推進者自行 tab 到 CTA 再 Enter」— 這在機制上不成立:Radix Popover 預設 modal=false(react-popover/dist/index.mjs:35 `modal = false`、:226 `trapped: trapFocus=false`),content portal 在 body 末端;焦點在 trigger(= DismissableLayer 之外)時按 Tab,焦點落到頁面下一個 focusable(仍在 layer 外)→ react-dismissable-layer/dist/index.mjs:191 `focusin` listener → onFocusOutside → :57 `if (!event.defaultPrevented) onDismiss()`(NonModal 的 onInteractOutside 只在 target 是 trigger 或 pointerdown 時 preventDefault)→ **Coachmark 直接關閉**。結果:鍵盤使用者完全無法按到 Previous / Skip / Next(多步 tour 鍵盤無法推進,只能 Esc 退出);且焦點停在 PopoverTrigger 上按 Enter = toggle 關閉浮層。popover.spec.md A11y 段自己也明文「焦點離開 content 樹 → DismissableLayer dismiss」,與 coachmark 的宣稱互相矛盾。A.1b claim-vs-code 比對抓不到此題(claim 與 code comment 一致,錯在跨 lib runtime 機制)。
confirmed.suggestion: 保留 preventDefault(不 auto-focus CTA,防 Enter 誤推進)但補 focus content 容器本身:`onOpenAutoFocus={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); (e.currentTarget as HTMLElement).focus({ preventScroll: true }) }}`(FocusScope div 自帶 tabIndex=-1 可 focus)。焦點進入 layer 內 → focus-outside dismiss 不再誤觸發,Tab 第一下即達 content 內第一個 CTA(對齊 dialog.tsx handleOpenAutoFocus 的 `?? content` fallback canonical);Enter 按在容器上無任何動作,原設計意圖(不誤推進)完整保留。同步修正 coachmark.spec.md L169/L206 的行為描述。SSOT-affecting UI/UX 行為改動 → 走 ASK 提議流程。

verdict.reason: Verified end-to-end against installed lib sources. (1) Pattern exists: coachmark.tsx:170 onOpenAutoFocus preventDefault keeps focus on trigger; comment L167-169 + coachmark.spec.md L169/L206 claim users can "tab to CTA". (2) Mechanism confirmed broken: Radix Popover defaults modal=false (react-popover dist: `modal = false`), local popover.tsx wrapper and Coachmark never set modal → PopoverContentNonModal with trapFocus:false; DismissableLayer registers a document-level focusin listener (react-dismissable-layer dist:191) that fires onFocusOutside → onDismiss when not prevented (dist:51-57), and the non-modal onInteractOutside only preventDefaults when target is the trigger or focusin-after-pointerdown (dist:194-196). Content is portaled to body end (popover.tsx:53), so Tab from the trigger lands on the next in-app focusable — outside the layer — and dismisses the Coachmark; Enter on trigger toggles it closed (onOpenToggle). Previous/Skip/Next are keyboard-unreachable in any real page. Aggravating: the base Popover wrapper already solved this trap via handlePopoverOpenAutoFocus (popover.tsx:37-46, moves focus INTO content on open), and Coachmark's override (onOpenAutoFocus ?? default, popover.tsx:64) re-creates it. popover.spec.md:171 itself documents dismiss-on-focus-out, contradicting coachmark's spec claim. Only escape hatch: in a trivial story where trigger is the last tabbable, Tab falls into the body-end portal and appears to work — explains why demos passed, does not refute real-page breakage. (3) Severity P1 appropriate: WCAG 2.1.1 keyboard failure of the component's primary action path (multi-step tour cannot advance via keyboard, only Esc exit), but component-scoped, mouse unaffected, Esc works → not P0.

confirmed.title: Toast 自動關閉計時器不因鍵盤焦點暫停 — 鍵盤使用者跟 4 秒倒數賽跑才按得到 復原/重試
confirmed.detail: sonner 2.0.7 source 驗證:計時器僅在 `expanded || interacting || isDocumentHidden` 時暫停(node_modules/sonner/dist/index.mjs:605);`interacting` 只由 onPointerDown/onPointerUp 設定(:1140-1142),`expanded` 只由 onMouseEnter/onMouseMove(:1128-1129)或 hotkey ⌥T(:1049-1053)設定。toast `<li>` 有 `tabIndex: 0`(:645)= 一般 Tab 可達,但 **Tab 進 toast 不觸發任何 pause** → 滑鼠 hover 暫停倒數(anatomy story L227 有文件)、鍵盤 focus 不暫停。DS `toast()` 預設 `duration = 4000`(toast.tsx:83)且不分 variant / 有無 action — 鍵盤或 switch 使用者要在 4 秒內 Tab 到 `復原`/`重試` action button(spec L47 明文支持 undo 場景),實務上常失敗即消失,WCAG 2.2.1(Timing Adjustable)風險。世界級對照:Carbon actionable notification 預設 persistent、Material Snackbar 帶 action 建議加長,Polaris toast with action 建議 ≥10s。
confirmed.suggestion: DS 層可修(不需動 sonner):`toast()` 內 `const { duration = options.action ? 10000 : 4000, ...rest }`(或 action 場景 `Infinity` + 靠 dismiss X / action 關閉),並在 toast.spec.md「A11y 預設」補 hotkey ⌥T(sonner 內建,focus 進 list 即 expanded=true → 倒數暫停)的鍵盤路徑說明。duration 預設值屬 SSOT-affecting 行為 → 提議由 user 拍板數值。

verdict.reason: Verified against installed sonner 2.0.7 source: timer pauses only on `expanded || interacting || isDocumentHidden` (index.mjs:605); exhaustive grep of all setExpanded/setInteracting call sites confirms they fire only on mouse enter/move (:1128-1129), pointer down/up (:1140-1142), and the undocumented ⌥T hotkey (:1052) — the list onFocus handler (:1120) only tracks focus for restoration and never pauses. Toast <li> has tabIndex:0 (:645) so Tab reaches it without pausing. DS toast.tsx:83 defaults duration=4000 uniformly (no variant/action differentiation), spec L47 explicitly endorses the 4-second undo scenario, and the DS is sonner-based (not Radix Toast, which pauses on focus), with no wrapper mitigation. The anatomy story documents hover-pause only; the ⌥T hotkey is a technical keyboard pause but undocumented in DS and not triggered by Tab, so it doesn't refute the finding. WCAG 2.2.1 risk on a spec-endorsed action flow is genuine. P1 (not P0) because mouse users have hover-pause, spec frames action as non-essential backhand, consumers can override duration, and core operation isn't blocked.

confirmed.title: SelectMenu 鍵盤 cursor 完全無視覺回饋 — data-[selected=true]:bg-transparent 抹掉唯一 highlight 通道
confirmed.detail: CommandItem className 'data-[selected=true]:bg-transparent' 蓋掉 command.tsx:138 base 'data-[selected=true]:bg-neutral-hover'。已用 node 跑 tailwind-merge 機械證明:合併輸出只剩 bg-transparent(bg-neutral-hover 被 strip)。cmdk 是 virtual focus(aria-activedescendant,DOM focus 停在 input / cmdk-root),內層 MenuItem 的 hover:bg-neutral-hover(menu-item.tsx:198)與 focus-visible:bg-neutral-hover(:43)在鍵盤導覽時永不觸發 → ArrowUp/Down 移動 cursor 時畫面零變化,只有 scrollIntoView 偶爾洩漏位置。滑鼠路徑靠真實 :hover 遮蔽了此 bug。影響 Select / Combobox / PeoplePicker 全家(皆消費 SelectMenu)。直接違反 select-menu.spec.md:217「aria-activedescendant 高亮」與 command.spec.md:121 highlight canonical;全庫 grep 過 css/stories 無其他 [cmdk-item][data-selected] 視覺 hook 補位。
confirmed.suggestion: 鏡射 DropdownMenu wrapper pattern(單一互動 bg owner 在外層 primitive):移除 bg-transparent override 讓 CommandItem 恢復 data-[selected=true]:bg-neutral-hover;內層 MenuItem 改傳 '!bg-transparent hover:!bg-transparent'(同 dropdown-menu.tsx:267);persistent selection bg 上移 CommandItem(isSelected && 'bg-neutral-selected data-[selected=true]:bg-neutral-selected',對齊 dropdown-menu.tsx:252)。修後 playwright ArrowDown walk 逐 step pixel-verify(M32)。

verdict.reason: Verified end-to-end. (1) select-menu.tsx:373/:404 do apply data-[selected=true]:bg-transparent to CommandItem; command.tsx:138 base is data-[selected=true]:bg-neutral-hover. (2) Independently re-ran tailwind-merge with the project's real extendTailwindMerge config (lib/utils.ts) — merged output keeps only bg-transparent; bg-neutral-hover is stripped, and the surviving data-[selected=true]:text-foreground is visually a no-op. (3) Refutation attempts all failed: cmdk 1.1.1 dist source confirms virtual focus (items role=option, no tabIndex, ArrowUp/Down on cmdk-root, aria-activedescendant, only scrollIntoView on active item), so MenuItem's hover:bg-neutral-hover (menu-item.tsx:198) and focus-visible:bg-neutral-hover (:43) never fire during keyboard nav; DS-wide grep across tsx/ts/css finds zero other [cmdk-item]/[data-selected] visual hooks; MenuItem selected prop is persistent value-selection, not the keyboard cursor; git log -L shows the line unchanged since SelectMenu's creation commit with no documented alternative channel. (4) select-menu.spec.md Focus 段 promises aria-activedescendant 高亮 + 「鍵盤完整可操作」, and command.spec.md:121 defines the bg-neutral-hover temporary-highlight canonical — both violated. (5) Select / Combobox / PeoplePicker / TimePicker / DataTable filter panel all consume SelectMenu, so the entire select family has an invisible keyboard cursor — a WCAG 2.4.7 (Focus Visible) functional a11y break on flagship components. P0 stands.

confirmed.title: 多選 footer「全部」全選列鍵盤不可達 — 無 tabIndex、無 keydown、在 cmdk 導覽範圍外
confirmed.detail: MenuFooter 內的 MenuItem 是純 div + onClick(menu-item.tsx:189-210 無 tabIndex 無 Enter/Space 處理);cmdk 鍵盤導覽只查詢 CommandList listInnerRef 內的 [cmdk-item](cmdk dist V() 實作),footer 在 List 外 → 方向鍵到不了;無 focusable → Tab 也跳過。鍵盤使用者完全無法操作 Select All(WCAG 2.1.1)。附帶:此 MenuItem 渲染 role='option' + aria-selected 卻不在任何 listbox 內(invalid ARIA context);「全部」字面 hardcode(:426)無 prop 可覆寫也無 i18n-allow 標記(同檔 searchPlaceholder/emptyText 皆有)。
confirmed.suggestion: footer 列改真實 focusable checkbox 語意:tabIndex={0} + role='checkbox' + aria-checked={allState} + onKeyDown Enter/Space → handleSelectAll(取代 role='option');或改為 forceMount CommandItem 固定在 CommandList 底部讓 cmdk 導覽涵蓋。順手補 selectAllLabel prop + i18n-allow 註記。

verdict.reason: Confirmed via source: select-menu.tsx L418-429 footer MenuItem only gets onClick (no tabIndex/onKeyDown); menu-item.tsx L188-210 renders a plain div with no built-in keyboard handling and its inner Checkbox is tabIndex={-1} pointer-events-none, so nothing in the footer is focusable (Tab skips). cmdk dist source proves arrow-key/Enter navigation only queries '[cmdk-item=\"\"]' inside CommandList's listInnerRef sizer — the footer is both outside CommandList and not a CommandItem, so it is doubly unreachable; no alternate shortcut exists. Radix Popover adds nothing for non-focusable divs. This contradicts select-menu.spec.md L219's explicit claim 「鍵盤完整可操作(無需滑鼠)」= WCAG 2.1.1 Level A failure. Reaches production users: public Combobox passes multiple (combobox.tsx L824) and PeoplePicker always uses SelectMenu. Side claims also verified: role=\"option\" + aria-selected rendered outside any listbox (invalid ARIA context), and 「全部」hardcoded at L426 with no override prop and no i18n-allow marker (unlike searchPlaceholder/emptyText at L143-144). P1 is calibrated correctly — not P0 because keyboard users can still select every option individually via cmdk navigation (Select All is a convenience control), so core selection remains keyboard-operable.

confirmed.title: DropdownMenu selected/checked 項:鍵盤 cursor 停留時零可感知回饋(本輪 Q2 改動的缺口)
confirmed.detail: Radix menu 是 real DOM focus roving;radixItemClass(:59-64)= outline-none + 唯一 focus 指示是 data-[highlighted]:bg-neutral-hover。Q2 override 讓 selected 項的 highlighted bg = selected bg(neutral-2 不變)→ cursor 走到 selected 項時畫面完全無變化(該狀態 WCAG 2.4.7 focus-visible fail;實際 DOM focus 在該項上)。RadioItem 又「不渲染 radio 控件」(dropdown-menu.spec.md:171),bg 是唯一 selection 指示器 → 單一 bg 通道同時背 selection + cursor 兩職,是 root invariant 衝突。spec 內部矛盾:dropdown-menu.spec.md:246 宣稱「鍵盤導覽到的項目以 highlight 底色標示」在 selected 項不成立(:212 Q2 override 未同步修此句)。Q2 拍板只 document 了 bg precedence,未 document cursor 消失是接受的 tradeoff → 非 documented exception。
confirmed.suggestion: SSOT 視覺決策需拍板,兩案:(a)消費既有 token family bg-neutral-selected-active(neutral-3,semantic.css:356;Button toggle 已消費此家族 button.tsx:204-205 = M23 nearest canonical)— selected×highlighted 用加深一階,深化而非洗掉 selection,不違 Q2 invariant;(b)VS Code list.focusOutline idiom:selected && 'data-[highlighted]:ring-1 data-[highlighted]:ring-inset'。落地後同步修 spec:246 措辭 + RadioItem/CheckboxItem 同規則。

verdict.reason: Confirmed in code: dropdown-menu.tsx:252 (Item selected) and :433 (RadioItem checked) override data-[highlighted] bg to bg-neutral-selected — identical to rest selected bg (neutral-2); radixItemClass:59-64 has outline-none and no other focus channel; inner MenuItem is !bg-transparent role=presentation. Radix is unstyled (data-highlighted is the only hook, real DOM focus + outline-none = no UA ring), so keyboard cursor on a selected/checked item produces zero pixel change — WCAG 2.4.7 claim holds. RadioItem renders no radio control (spec:171), so bg is simultaneously the sole selection AND sole cursor indicator — the single-channel root-invariant conflict is real, deviating from world-class two-channel norms (shadcn/Radix default dot ItemIndicator, macOS checkmark+highlight, VS Code list.focusOutline). Q2's cited benchmarks (Ant/VS Code :hover:not(.selected)) are mouse-hover rules where the pointer self-indicates position; they don't cover keyboard cursor. Spec self-contradiction verified: dropdown-menu.spec.md:246 still unconditionally claims keyboard-navigated items are marked by highlight bg and :248 claims WCAG AA + full keyboard operability — false for selected items post-Q2, not synced (M5 violation: selected × keyboard-focus overlay consequence undocumented). Refutation attempts failed: CheckboxItem is unaffected (no bg override; checkbox = separate channel), confirming the finding's precise scoping. Note the token system already provides --neutral-selected-hover (= neutral-1, semantic.css:355, labeled Selected + Hover) as an in-system fix path Q2 did not consume. P1 severity appropriate: keyboard-only a11y defect in one state combination, still functionally operable (not P0), but guaranteed to occur on every keyboard pass through RadioGroup menus and contradicts the spec's WCAG AA claim (above P2).

confirmed.title: SelectMenu 巢狀 role='option' + 兩個語意相反的 aria-selected
confirmed.detail: 內層 MenuItem 未 override role → menu-item.tsx:191 預設 role='option' + aria-selected(persistent selection)+ aria-disabled,巢狀在 cmdk CommandItem(本身 role='option' + aria-selected=cursor,cmdk dist source 證實)之內。aria-activedescendant 指向外層 id,AT 讀到 option 裡包 option、且內外 aria-selected 語意相反(外=cursor、內=選中)→ 朗讀錯亂;aria-disabled 亦雙重。同場景 DropdownMenu 已正確處理(dropdown-menu.tsx:265-267 傳 role='presentation')。
confirmed.suggestion: SelectMenu 的內層 MenuItem 傳 role='presentation'(鏡射 DropdownMenu),讓 cmdk CommandItem 當唯一 option 節點;persistent selection 的 ARIA 表達由外層承擔(cmdk aria-selected=cursor 是上游已知 tradeoff,至少先消除巢狀 option)。

verdict.reason: Verified against all three sources. (1) Pattern exists: select-menu.tsx:375-386 renders MenuItem (selected/checked/disabled) inside CommandItem with no role override; Menu/menu-item.tsx:191-193 hardcodes role="option" + aria-selected={selected||checked===true} + aria-disabled, and the props spread at line 207 comes after, so an override would work — SelectMenu never passes one. DS Command wrapper (command.tsx:131-143) is a className-only passthrough. (2) Behavior inference correct: cmdk dist source confirms CommandItem renders role="option" + aria-selected=(cursor match) + aria-disabled + id, and CommandList is role="listbox" with aria-activedescendant → outer item id. Nothing (Radix/cmdk/wrapper) strips the inner role. Result: option nested in option with semantically opposite aria-selected (outer=keyboard cursor, inner=persistent selection) and doubled aria-disabled — an ARIA authoring error ("option" has presentational children); browsers either expose contradictory double options or prune the inner semantics, losing the only place selection state lives. Both outcomes break AT announcement. (3) No documented exception: select-menu.spec.md:206/217 describes a single role="option" per item; and the DS's own canonical for the identical nesting, dropdown-menu.tsx:265-267, passes role="presentation" ("Pure visual — Radix parent handles role/aria") — SelectMenu missed the same treatment. Severity P1 is correct: serious a11y defect on a core select control (screen-reader state wrong/lost) but functionally intact for non-AT users, so not P0.

confirmed.title: searchable Select(含 PeoplePicker single / Combobox searchIn='trigger')開啟後方向鍵與 Enter 完全無法導覽選單 — 只能滑鼠選取
confirmed.detail: searchable 開啟後焦點在 trigger 內的裸 <input>(onOpenAutoFocus 顯式 focus,select.tsx:654),但 cmdk 的 ArrowDown/ArrowUp/Home/End/Enter handler 綁在 portal 內的 [cmdk-root](已讀 node_modules/cmdk/dist/index.mjs:root 元素 onKeyDown,tabIndex:-1)— trigger input 的鍵盤事件在不同 DOM 子樹,永遠 bubble 不到 cmdk root。trigger 自己的 onKeyDown 對 Enter/Space/ArrowDown 全掛 `!open` guard,open 後三鍵皆 no-op。結果:searchable Select、PeoplePicker single(永遠 searchable)、Combobox searchIn='trigger' 打開後鍵盤只能 Esc 關閉,無法上下移動、無法 Enter 選取(WCAG 2.1.1)。spec 卻宣稱「方向鍵在選項間移動,Enter 選取」「鍵盤完整可操作」(select.spec.md:322,328;combobox.spec.md:173)。註:2026-06-11 R2 只修了『關閉時鍵盤打不開』,開啟後的導覽 gap 仍在;non-searchable 路徑因 handleNonSearchableAutoFocus 聚焦 cmdk-root 而正常。
confirmed.suggestion: APG combobox-with-list pattern:trigger input 加 onKeyDown 把 ArrowDown/ArrowUp/Home/End/Enter 轉送給選單 — 最小侵入做法是在 Select/Combobox 保存 PopoverContent ref,對 `[cmdk-root]` re-dispatch 同款 KeyboardEvent(cmdk root handler 會處理並更新 active item);同時把 cmdk 的 selectedItemId 以 aria-activedescendant 綁回 input(對齊 cmdk 自家 Input 的做法:role=combobox + aria-activedescendant)。修完把 select.spec.md/combobox.spec.md 的鍵盤宣稱標回真實。

verdict.reason: Confirmed via source reads. (1) Pattern exists: searchable Select renders a bare input in the trigger with focus explicitly kept there (select.tsx:215-223, 654), passes searchable={false} to SelectMenu (select.tsx:645) so no in-popover CommandInput; trigger onKeyDown guards Enter/Space/ArrowDown with !open (select.tsx:621-631) → all no-op when open. Same for Combobox searchIn='trigger' (combobox.tsx:751-759, 779-790, 825, 833); PeoplePicker single wraps <Select searchable> (people-picker.tsx:256-283). (2) Behavior inference correct: cmdk dist source shows ArrowDown/ArrowUp/Home/End/Enter handled solely in onKeyDown on the [cmdk-root] div (tabIndex:-1); CommandInput relies on DOM bubbling. Trigger input is in PopoverTrigger subtree, cmdk root in portaled PopoverContent — events can never reach it; no forwarding/dispatchEvent anywhere in Select/Combobox/PeoplePicker/SelectMenu/Command/Popover; Radix Popover adds no listbox nav. Contrast case proves mechanism: non-searchable works because handleNonSearchableAutoFocus focuses [cmdk-root] itself (select-menu.tsx:264-268, 293). (3) Spec contradiction real: select.spec.md「↑/↓ 選單展開後在選項間移動」「鍵盤完整可操作」, combobox.spec.md「方向鍵在選項間移動,Enter 選取」. Only minor citation drift: people-picker.tsx cited range 213-229 is display/readonly code; actual single-mode Select wrap is 256-283 — substance unaffected. Severity P0 justified: total keyboard inoperability of selection (WCAG 2.1.1 Level A) on three shipped paths; repo itself labeled the sibling open-when-closed half of this bug P0 a11y (select.tsx:623 comment, 2026-06-11 R2).

confirmed.title: 多選「全部」select-all footer 鍵盤完全不可達(非 CommandItem、div 無 tabIndex)
confirmed.detail: multi 模式 footer 的「全部」是 MenuFooter 內裸 MenuItem(div role='option',無 tabIndex),且位於 CommandList 之外 — cmdk 方向鍵只導覽 [cmdk-item],Tab 也到不了 div。鍵盤使用者(Combobox multiple / PeoplePicker multi)無法全選/全清。附帶 ARIA 結構問題:此 role='option' 沒有 listbox 祖先(orphan option,axe aria-required-parent)。
confirmed.suggestion: 把 footer item 改為真實可聚焦控制:render 成 <button role='checkbox' aria-checked={allState}>(tabIndex 0)+ Enter/Space toggle,或對齊 Ant Select 把「全選」做成 list 內第一個 CommandItem(cmdk 導覽自然可達)。同步移除 orphan role='option'。

verdict.reason: Confirmed against code + cmdk library source. (1) Pattern exists: select-menu.tsx:415-429 renders the multi-mode「全部」select-all as a bare MenuItem inside MenuFooter (plain div), placed inside <Command> but outside </CommandList> (line 413), not a CommandItem. (2) Behavior inference verified in node_modules/cmdk/dist/index.mjs: cmdk keyboard navigation queries '[cmdk-item=\"\"]:not([aria-disabled=\"true\"])' scoped to the CommandList inner sizer (listInnerRef), so the footer is doubly excluded (not cmdk-item + outside list); Enter only fires on the virtually-selected [cmdk-item]. MenuItem (menu-item.tsx:188-210) renders div role=\"option\" with no tabIndex, inner Checkbox is tabIndex={-1} + pointer-events-none, and no alternate keyboard path (no Ctrl+A / onKeyDown) exists anywhere in select-menu.tsx — the control is fully keyboard-inoperable. Radix Popover does not make untabbable divs reachable; nothing intercedes. (3) Real consumer exposure confirmed: combobox.tsx:824 passes multiple to SelectMenu, PeoplePicker multi wraps Combobox — so Combobox multiple / PeoplePicker multi keyboard users cannot select-all/clear-all. (4) ARIA orphan confirmed: only role=\"listbox\" is CommandList; footer option's ancestors (MenuFooter div → cmdk-root div → PopoverContent) contain no listbox → axe aria-required-parent (critical). This also falsifies select-menu.spec.md:217-219 explicit claims「鍵盤完整可操作(無需滑鼠)」and「0 critical violation」. P1 (not P0) is appropriate: per-option keyboard selection still works so the task is achievable item-by-item, but a visible interactive control that is completely keyboard-unreachable is a WCAG 2.1.1 Level A failure contradicting the spec's promises.

confirmed.title: emptyText / loading 空狀態對 SR 不可感知 — cmdk Empty 是 role='presentation' 且全鏈無 aria-live
confirmed.detail: 本輪 emptyText 接線後視覺生效,但 SR 驗證結果是否定的:CommandEmpty 在 cmdk 渲染為 role='presentation' div,Empty 元件也無 role/aria(已 grep components/Empty/empty.tsx 無 aria),SelectMenu/Select/Combobox 全鏈沒有任何 aria-live region。SR 使用者在搜尋框打字打到 0 結果時聽不到「沒有符合的選項」,loading spinner 佔位同樣無聲(aria-busy 有接在 CommandList 但多數 SR 不主動播報 busy 變化)。對照 react-select A11yText / APG combobox 都有 polite live region 播報結果數或 no-results。
confirmed.suggestion: 在 SelectMenu 加一個 visually-hidden `<div role='status' aria-live='polite'>`,內容隨 filtered 結果變化播報:0 筆時輸出 emptyText、loading 時輸出載入文案(可選:結果數 N 筆)。放 SelectMenu 一處,Select/Combobox/PeoplePicker 全體受益(SSOT propagation)。

verdict.reason: Confirmed at every layer. (1) Pattern exists: select-menu.tsx:349-357 renders emptyText/loading inside CommandEmpty; cmdk dist source verbatim renders CommandEmpty as role="presentation" div; CommandList is role="listbox" with no live region; cmdk has zero aria-live; Empty/empty.tsx has no aria; grep for aria-live/role="status" across SelectMenu/Select/Combobox returns nothing. (2) Behavior inference correct and slightly understated: neither Radix Popover nor cmdk provides announcements; focus stays in the combobox input (aria-activedescendant), so newly-appearing presentation content is never announced; the loading spinner is worse than claimed — CircularProgress with no value/label/ariaLabel resolves a11yRole=undefined → aria-hidden={true} (circular-progress.tsx:115,130), removing it from the a11y tree entirely; aria-busy claim accurate (SRs defer rendering, don't announce busy changes). (3) Severity reinforced by the DS's own canonical: empty.spec.md lines 101/113/121 explicitly require the consumer container to add aria-live="polite" for dynamic filter/search no-results — SelectMenu is that consumer and doesn't comply, so this violates the project's own SSOT plus WCAG 2.1 SC 4.1.3 (AA) and world-class practice (react-select A11yText). P1 is right: real SR-facing gap in a core searchable combobox, but component stays operable when results exist, so not P0. Only nit: role="presentation" doesn't strip text from the a11y tree (a SR user manually browsing the popup could find it), but the announcement claim — the core of the finding — is correct.

confirmed.title: DatePicker(single)`needConfirm` 不帶 `showTime` = 死路 — footer 只在 showTime 才渲染,draft 永遠無法 commit

confirmed.detail: single DatePicker 的 footer 條件是 `{showTime && (...)}`;而 needConfirm 是公開 prop(docblock 明示可獨立設定,預設 showTime 時 true)。consumer 傳 `<DatePicker needConfirm>`(date-only)時:onSelect 只寫 draft(commitDraft)、`if (!needConfirm) setOpen(false)` 不關閉、又沒有任何「確定」按鈕 → 使用者點了日期什麼都不會發生,dismiss 後 draft 直接丟棄,onChange 永不 fire。Range 版已用 `(showTime || needConfirm)` 正確處理,single 漏了。
confirmed.suggestion: date-picker.tsx:639 條件改 `(showTime || needConfirm)` 對齊 Range;footer 內已有 needConfirm ? 確定 : 關閉 分支,無需其他改動。補 needConfirm-date-only story 驗證。

verdict.reason: Verified in date-picker.tsx: single-picker footer is gated `{showTime && ...}` (line 639) while the only draft-commit path (handleConfirm/確定, lines 505+646) lives inside it. With `<DatePicker needConfirm>` date-only (needConfirm = needConfirmProp ?? showTime, line 389), calendar onSelect only writes draft via commitDraft (lines 501-504, no onChange) and skips setOpen(false) (line 618), so the popover stays open with no confirm button; dismiss discards the draft on next open (re-sync from value, lines 400-403) and onChange never fires — plus the trigger misleadingly shows the uncommitted draft (displayValue = draft, line 408). No Radix/native rescue: commit logic is entirely component-level; typeable input commit (default off) bypasses needConfirm and doesn't fix the calendar path. Range version at line 1068 uses `(showTime || needConfirm)`, confirming intended design. Spec also treats needConfirm as an independent prop (date-picker.spec.md:153/213/231, Ant idiom). P1 confirmed: total functional dead-end on a documented public prop combo, but opt-in only — grep shows no current consumer passes needConfirm, and all default configurations are unaffected, so not P0.

confirmed.title: DatePickerRange 關閉 popover 後焦點掉到 body — 只用 PopoverAnchor,Radix triggerRef 為 null 且 preventDefault 擋掉 FocusScope 回復
confirmed.detail: 已讀 Radix popover source 驗證:close 時 onCloseAutoFocus 會 focus `context.triggerRef`(只有 PopoverTrigger 會填)然後 preventDefault 掉 FocusScope 的 previously-focused fallback。DatePickerRange 只用 PopoverAnchor(start/end 兩顆 button 自行 onClick 開啟),triggerRef 恆 null → Escape/確定/選完雙端自動關閉後,鍵盤焦點直接遺失到 document.body(WCAG 2.4.3)。single DatePicker/TimePicker/Select 都走 PopoverTrigger 所以正常,唯 Range 例外。
confirmed.suggestion: 給 start/end button 建 ref,PopoverContent 加 `onCloseAutoFocus={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); (activeEnd === 'start' ? startBtnRef : endBtnRef).current?.focus() }}` — 對齊 Ant RangePicker 關閉後焦點回 active 端輸入格的行為。

verdict.reason: Verified against both component and lib source. (1) Pattern exists: date-picker.tsx:906-974 DatePickerRange uses only PopoverAnchor; start/end buttons open via onClick; PopoverTrigger only in single DatePicker (:513); no onCloseAutoFocus override or manual .focus() restore anywhere in the file. (2) Behavior inference correct: Radix popover source shows triggerRef is only populated by PopoverTrigger (index.mjs:85), never by Anchor; non-modal path (DS default) onCloseAutoFocus does triggerRef.current?.focus() (no-op when null) then unconditionally event.preventDefault() (index.mjs:176-181), which suppresses FocusScope's unmount fallback focus(previouslyFocusedElement ?? document.body) (react-focus-scope index.mjs:90-94). FocusScope mount auto-focus moves focus into the popover on open, so after Escape/auto-close/確定-close the content unmounts and focus drops to document.body with no restore — WCAG 2.4.3 violation for keyboard users. Outside-click close intentionally skips restore in Radix (hasInteractedOutside) and is not part of the bug. Single DatePicker/TimePicker/Select use PopoverTrigger and are unaffected, matching the finding's scoping. P1 fits: keyboard/AT focus loss on a core Field control, but no data loss or mouse breakage.

confirmed.title: NumberInput 無 draft state — 負號/小數中間態被 controlled 回寫吃掉
confirmed.detail: edit 分支直接 value={value ?? ''} 控制 input,handleChange 把 raw '-' 映射為 onChange(null)、'1.' 映射為 onChange(1)。確定性失敗案例:欄位已有值 5,使用者全選後打「-」→ onChange(null) → 值變動觸發 re-render → DOM 被重設為空,負號被吃掉;接著打 5 得到 +5,無法輸入 -5。小數中間態('1.'、'0.0')能否存活取決於 parent setState 是否 Object.is bailout — 用 object state({...form, price:v})或 RHF 觸發 re-render 的場景 '.' 一樣被吃。spec(number-input.spec.md:109-110)只記載 NaN-ignore 與顯示層負號格式化,未記載此輸入限制;inputMode='decimal' + precision/貨幣範例(85.5%)明示支援小數,故非 documented exception。
confirmed.suggestion: 對齊 Ant InputNumber / Adobe Spectrum NumberField canonical:edit 分支加 internal draft string state — focus 期間 input 綁 draft 文字,onChange 更新 draft 並在 parse 成功時同步呼叫 onChange(parsed),但 DOM 顯示永遠用 draft;blur/Enter 時 commit(format + 清 draft);非 focus 期間才從 value prop 同步顯示。

verdict.reason: Verified against source: number-input.tsx has no internal draft state (no useState in file); edit branch is fully controlled (line 156 value={value ?? ''}) and handleChange (lines 129-140) maps raw '-' to onChange(null) and '1.' to onChange(1) (Number parse behavior confirmed via node). The deterministic failure holds: existing value 5 + select-all + '-' forces state 5→null (no Object.is bailout possible) → re-render resets DOM to '', eating the minus; decimal intermediates survive only under primitive-useState bailout and are eaten with object-state/RHF parents, exactly as the finding claims. Component is native input (not Radix), so nothing built-in rescues it; the spec's own benchmark (Ant InputNumber) keeps an internal string draft for this exact reason. Spec (number-input.spec.md:109-111) documents only NaN-ignore + display-layer negative formatting while 何時用/邊界案例 explicitly advertise decimals (85.5%, precision) and negatives — so this is spec-contradicting, not a documented exception. Only minor overstatement: -5 is still enterable via paste or caret-insertion after typing digits, but no normal typing flow works. P1 fits: deterministic functional data-entry failure in mainstream flows, yet not P0 (no crash/corruption, visible, workarounds exist).

confirmed.title: Textarea naked variant error+focus 顯藍非紅 — Q1 canonical 鏡射漏 naked 分支
confirmed.detail: field-wrapper.tsx 的 Q1 修法把 focus 藍全部移進 error:false compound(default:109 / bare:145 / naked:202 三處都有 gate),但 textarea.tsx 只鏡射了 default(:81)與 bare(:108)— naked edit compound(:140)的 'focus-visible:!border-primary focus-visible:hover:!border-primary' 沒有 error:false gate。已驗證 Tailwind v4 variant 註冊順序為 focus-within → hover → focus → focus-visible(node_modules/tailwindcss/dist/chunk-F4544Y4M.mjs),focus-visible 規則在 CSS 後段、同 specificity 同 !important → 蓋過 error compound(:112)的 focus-within:!border-error;且 textarea 屬文字輸入元素,瀏覽器對任何 focus 都匹配 :focus-visible → naked cell 內出錯的 Textarea 一聚焦(滑鼠或鍵盤)紅框即變藍,違反 Q1「聚焦時 error 紅保留」canonical。field-wrapper.tsx:150 明文「variant 不分 — naked cell 內 error 同樣紅框」。
confirmed.suggestion: 把 textarea.tsx:140 的兩個 focus-visible 藍 class 從 naked edit compound 抽出,移到新 compound { mode:'edit', variant:'naked', error:false }(一字不差鏡射 field-wrapper.tsx:202 的 gate 模式)。

verdict.reason: Confirmed real. (1) Pattern verified: field-wrapper.tsx gates focus-blue behind error:false in all 3 variants (:109 default / :145 bare / :202 naked) with :146 stating error red is variant-agnostic incl. naked; textarea.tsx mirrors the gate only for default (:81) and bare (:108) — the naked edit compound (:132-146) carries 'focus-visible:!border-primary focus-visible:hover:!border-primary' (:140) with no error key, so cva applies it even when error:true, alongside the error compound (:110-113) 'focus-within:!border-error'. (2) Cascade inference verified against installed Tailwind v4 dist (chunk-F4544Y4M.mjs): variant registration order is focus-within → hover → focus → focus-visible, so the blue focus-visible rule sorts later in the same border-color utility group; both selectors are specificity (0,2,0) + !important → source order wins → blue overrides red. Textarea is a text-entry element so browsers match :focus-visible on any focus modality (mouse or keyboard); tailwind-merge keeps both classes (different modifier stacks); no Radix/native layer intervenes (raw <textarea> owns its border). Net effect: naked+edit+error Textarea shows blue border on focus, violating the 2026-07-04 Q1 canonical ('error 勝 focus 顏色通道', border is the sole error carrier per field-wrapper.tsx:68) and falsifying textarea.tsx:65's own '鏡射 fieldWrapperStyles' claim. (3) Reachability nuance (slight overstatement in finding, not refuting): the first-party naked consumer DataTable cannot currently hit it — data-table.tsx:1549 'edit-clears-own-cell' clears error visuals on entering edit and cell-registry.tsx never passes error. However the combination is reachable via public API: Textarea's variant/error props are public (naked has no @internal marker, unlike Input's) and error inherits from <Field invalid> context via useResolvedFieldInvalid (field-context.ts:217-220); a consumer cell editor with live validation reproduces deterministically (autoFocus → instant blue). P1 stands: explicit fresh canonical violation with deterministic repro on a supported public state combination, but shielded from first-party surfaces, so not P0.

confirmed.title: LinkInput 視覺紅框漏接 fieldCtx.invalid — aria-invalid 與紅框不同步

verdict.reason: Verified by reading link-input.tsx + field-context.ts + field-wrapper.tsx + both specs. (1) Pattern exists exactly as claimed: :170 `error = errorProp || localError` excludes fieldCtx.invalid; :258 wrapper styles consume only this error; :273/:276 aria-invalid/aria-errormessage DO include fieldCtx?.invalid — aria/visual split is real. (2) No rescue mechanism: red border's sole carrier is fieldWrapperStyles error compound (field-wrapper.tsx:146-150); field.tsx only sets data-field-invalid + context (no prop cloning); DS-wide grep found zero CSS keyed to data-field-invalid/aria-invalid; LinkInput is a native <input>, no Radix; with error:false the focus compound (field-wrapper.tsx:109) even turns the border blue under <Field invalid> — confirming the「聚焦還變藍」claim. (3) Contract violation confirmed: field-controls.spec.md:156 mandates useResolvedFieldInvalid(prop)=prop OR fieldCtx.invalid (hook at field-context.ts:217), and link-input.spec.md:111 explicitly says invalid state fully inherits field-controls SSOT — no documented exception. (4) All 8 sibling text controls (Input/Textarea/NumberInput/Select/Combobox/DatePicker/TimePicker) import the resolver; LinkInput's :7 import list lacks it. (5) showLink branch :237-252 passes no error to wrapper, confirmed. confirmed.title: readOnly 的 Checkbox/Switch/RadioGroupItem 可被 label 點擊繞過 — 鎖互動失守
confirmed.detail: standalone readOnly 的鎖互動只靠 cva pointer-events-none + tabIndex=-1(checkbox.tsx:34,259 / switch.tsx:59,240 / radio-group.tsx:180,279),但三者帶 inline label 時都渲染 <label htmlFor={inputId}>(Checkbox/RadioGroupItem 經 SelectionItem selection-item.tsx:174、Switch 自家 switch.tsx:273)。Radix Root 是 <button>(labelable element),點 label 觸發瀏覽器 synthetic click activation 直達 button — 這不是 pointer event,pointer-events:none 攔不到 → readOnly checkbox/switch/radio 點文字即 toggle(uncontrolled 直接翻視覺;controlled 照樣 fire onCheckedChange/onValueChange)。違反 checkbox.spec.md:252「readOnly …鎖互動但保留 checked 視覺」與 field-controls.spec.md:73「standalone readOnly 維持原樣鎖互動」明文契約。
confirmed.suggestion: SelectionItem 增 readOnly prop(由 Checkbox/RadioGroupItem 以 effectiveReadOnly 傳入),label 上加 onClick={e => readOnly && e.preventDefault()}(preventDefault 可取消 label 的 synthetic activation);Switch 自家 label(switch.tsx:272)同修。並在 Radix Root 加 onClick capture guard(effectiveReadOnly 時 preventDefault)作第二道防線,防 consumer 自寫 label htmlFor 同樣繞過。

verdict.reason: Confirmed real via source read + empirical browser test. All three components lock readOnly only with cva pointer-events-none + tabIndex=-1 (checkbox.tsx:34,259 / switch.tsx:59,240 / radio-group.tsx:180,279), yet with inline label render a real <label htmlFor> pointing at the Radix <button> (Checkbox/RadioGroupItem via selection-item.tsx:174, Switch via switch.tsx:272). Playwright test in-repo proved: direct click on a pointer-events:none button is blocked, but clicking its associated label dispatches a synthetic click that toggles it — pointer-events:none cannot intercept label activation. Radix checkbox/switch/radio-group dist source has zero readonly handling and toggles unconditionally in onClick, so readOnly is bypassed: uncontrolled flips real state, controlled fires onCheckedChange/onValueChange. This violates the explicit contracts at checkbox.spec.md:252 (standalone/inline-label readOnly = 鎖互動) and field-controls.spec.md:73-74 (standalone readOnly 維持原樣鎖互動) — the vulnerable path is the documented supported scenario (settings list / SelectionItem row). P1 stands: cross-component silent state mutation breaking a documented contract, but no crash and Field-readonly/disabled branches are safe.

confirmed.title: useFormValidation.handleSubmit 無 double-submit 防護、無 isSubmitting、onSubmit rejection 未接
confirmed.detail: 規則 9 明定業務/async 驗證(API 查名稱重複等)defer 到 submit,但 handleSubmit 在 await onSubmit(current) 期間:(a) 無 re-entrancy guard — 使用者連點 submit / 連按 Enter 會並發呼叫 onSubmit 兩次(重複建立資源的經典事故);(b) return 值只有 submitDisabled(dirty 驅動),不暴露 isSubmitting → consumer 無法做 Button loading / disable,spec 的「不可配置的預設」哲學下 consumer 也沒有掛載點自防;(c) onSubmit throw/reject 時無 try/catch → unhandled rejection,錯誤被吞、表單無任何回饋(違反五態「error 不吞」)。世界級對照:RHF formState.isSubmitting 內建 + submit 期間自動擋重入;Polaris/Mantine form 皆暴露 submitting。form-validation.spec.md 全文無 double-submit / busy 記載(已 grep 驗證),非 documented exception。
confirmed.suggestion: handleSubmit 加 isSubmittingRef guard(進入即 return)+ React state isSubmitting 暴露進 UseFormValidationReturn(submitDisabled 併入 || isSubmitting);onSubmit 包 try/finally,catch 時 re-throw 前先復位 isSubmitting,並在 spec「Submit 驗證」段補 codify。

verdict.reason: Verified against source: use-form-validation.ts:190-229 custom handleSubmit has (a) no re-entrancy guard — concurrent submits both reach `await onSubmit(current)` (line 214); (b) return surface (lines 73-90, 231-242) exposes only submitDisabled (dirty-driven), no isSubmitting — and since RHF is fully wrapped (lines 9-11) and the hook never calls RHF's own handleSubmit, RHF's built-in formState.isSubmitting (confirmed in react-hook-form dist source) never fires and is unreachable; (c) line 214 has no try/catch → onSubmit rejection becomes an unhandled promise rejection in a React form handler, error state never set, form silently dead — contradicting the file's own charter (lines 5-6 "不可配置的預設") and five-states "error 不吞". Grep of form-validation.spec.md found zero double-submit/isSubmitting/busy mention — not a documented exception. Spec's own usage example (line 67) documents async API onSubmit, so the vulnerable window is the documented canonical path, not theoretical. Two nuances that don't overturn: RHF exposes isSubmitting but doesn't auto-block re-entry (finding slightly overstates), and consumer could hand-roll a guard inside their own onSubmit — but that defeats the hook's executable-canonical purpose and can't produce a loading state. Severity P1 confirmed: public canonical API, affects all consumers following documented usage, failure classes are duplicate resource creation + swallowed errors; not P0 since current in-repo consumers (stories only) use sync onSubmit.

confirmed.title: FileUpload:file input 選檔後未 reset value,同一檔案重選完全無反應
confirmed.detail: 兩個 <input type=file> 的 onChange 都只呼叫 filterAndDispatch(e.target.files),沒有清 e.target.value。瀏覽器對相同路徑檔案不觸發 change event,所以「上傳失敗 → 使用者修正檔案內容 → 再選同一個檔」或「刪除後重傳同檔」會靜默無反應(error 修復路徑被吞)。Ant Design Upload / react-dropzone 皆在 dispatch 後 reset input value。
confirmed.suggestion: onChange 內 dispatch 後補 e.target.value = ''(或 dispatch 前先讀出 FileList 再清),兩個 variant 的 input 都要改。

verdict.reason: Confirmed at file-upload.tsx:229 and :310 — both native file inputs call only filterAndDispatch(e.target.files); grep of the whole FileUpload dir shows no value reset, no key-remount of the input, no imperative handle (inputRef used only for .click()), and the hidden input/ref is not consumer-accessible, so no workaround exists. It is a bare native input (no Radix/lib wrapper that would handle this; React never clears file inputs), so same-file re-selection fires no change event and is silently swallowed. Verified cited libs against real source: rc-upload (Ant Design) resets via setState({uid: getUid()}) + key={uid} remount after onChange; react-dropzone sets inputRef.current.value = null before .click() explicitly so re-selecting the same file fires change (minor wording nit: react-dropzone resets before opening the dialog, not after dispatch — same substance). Severity P1 stands because the component's own API makes the broken flows first-class: status='error' supports the fail→fix→re-select-same-file recovery loop and onRemove makes delete→re-upload-same-file a designed interaction; both silently no-op. Not P0 since first-time uploads work and drag-drop path (dataTransfer.files) is unaffected.

confirmed.title: FileUpload:dragleave 無 relatedTarget guard,拖曳滑過內部 Empty 內容時 drag-over 高亮熄滅
confirmed.detail: 拖檔進入 dropzone 後,pointer 移到子元素(Empty 的 icon/title div)時 DOM 先對子元素發 dragenter(bubble 設 true)、再對舊 target(dropzone 本體)發 dragleave(bubble 設 false),最終 state=false → border-primary 高亮在使用者正對準 dropzone 中央時反而消失,直到再碰到容器邊緣才恢復。經典 drag-flicker bug,程式內無 counter 也無 relatedTarget 檢查。
confirmed.suggestion: onDragLeave 加 guard:if (e.currentTarget.contains(e.relatedTarget as Node)) return;或改用 enter/leave depth counter。

verdict.reason: Confirmed. file-upload.tsx:264-268 onDragLeave unconditionally calls setDragOver(false) with no relatedTarget-contains guard and no enter/leave counter (DS-wide grep: zero guard hits). Component is self-built on native HTML5 drag events (spec.md:27 declares 自建, no Radix primitive), and React delegates raw dragenter/dragleave bubbling semantics without enter/leave synthesis for drag events. Default content renders nested Empty children (icon div / title span / description span) inside the dropzone, so pointer movement toward the center crosses child boundaries: dragenter fires on the child (bubbles, sets true) then dragleave fires on the dropzone (sets false) → final state false → the spec'd drag-over border-primary highlight (file-upload.spec.md:62) extinguishes while the user aims at the dropzone center. Classic drag-flicker bug; react-dropzone (cited in spec as the drag API benchmark) guards exactly this. One detail in the finding is off — native dragleave does bubble per HTML spec — but that worsens rather than refutes the bug. Drop functionality is unaffected (dragover/drop bubble from children), so it is a visual-feedback defect in the component's primary gesture, violating its own documented 4-state machine: P1 stands.

confirmed.title: FileUpload:disabled / loading 時 dragover+drop 提前 return 未 preventDefault,瀏覽器直接開啟被丟的檔案(整頁導航走人)
confirmed.detail: onDragOver / onDrop 開頭 `if (isBlocked) return` 在 preventDefault 之前。dragover 沒 preventDefault = drop 不被攔截,瀏覽器 default 行為是在當前 tab 開啟該檔案 → loading 中(使用者剛送出第一批檔案)再丟第二個檔會直接離開 app,表單狀態全失。「loading 不阻斷輸入 + 防 double-submit」應該是吞掉操作而非讓瀏覽器接管。
confirmed.suggestion: isBlocked 時仍先 e.preventDefault()(dragover 與 drop 都要),之後才 return,不執行 filterAndDispatch;對齊 react-dropzone / Ant Dragger disabled 行為。

verdict.reason: Verified at file-upload.tsx:269-278 — `if (isBlocked) return` precedes e.preventDefault() in both onDragOver and onDrop (isBlocked = disabled || loading, line 168). Component is a hand-rolled div dropzone (no Radix/lib layer to intercept), and the code deliberately removed pointer-events-none (comment at lines 293-294, 2026-06-03 Q4) relying on handler guards, so the element DOES receive drag events while blocked, then early-returns without cancelling. Per HTML DnD spec, uncancelled dragover means the element is not a valid drop target and the browser default for dropped files applies: navigate current tab to the file — user drops a second batch during loading and the SPA unloads, losing all state. No window-level drag/drop guard exists anywhere in the DS. The component's own design intent ('loading blocks input to prevent double-submit') requires swallowing the drop, not surrendering to browser navigation (Polaris DropZone calls stopEvent before its disabled check). P1 is appropriate: data-loss-grade consequence but requires a specific user action (drop while blocked) — not unconditional enough for P0, too harmful for P2. Fix: move e.preventDefault() before the isBlocked guard in both handlers.

confirmed.title: Tabs:inlineAction slot 造成 button 巢 button(Radix TabsTrigger 是原生 <button>,ItemInlineAction 也是 <button>)
confirmed.detail: Radix Tabs Trigger render Primitive.button(node_modules/@radix-ui/react-tabs/dist/index.mjs:109),inlineAction 的建議用法(ItemInlineAction / DropdownMenuTrigger asChild + ItemInlineActionButton)是原生 button(item-anatomy.tsx ItemInlineActionButton)。結果是 interactive 巢 interactive:HTML 不合法、axe nested-interactive serious、SR 對 tab 的 accessible name 會混入 action 內容、鍵盤 Tab 會停進 tab 內部的隱藏 stop。stopPropagation 五連發只解 click 行為分流,解不了語意巢狀。tabs.spec.md:100 只文件化 split-click 意圖,沒有把巢狀 button 列為 accepted exception;GitHub「Code ▾」/ Linear 的 split-tab 實作都是 sibling 元素而非巢狀。
confirmed.suggestion: 把 inlineAction 移出 TabsPrimitive.Trigger,改成 sibling 佈局:wrapper span(relative)內 trigger + 絕對定位 action(同 SidebarMenuButton 的 suffixNode 模式,sidebar.tsx:1084-1108 已有 canonical 先例),trigger 加 paddingRight 預留。

verdict.reason: Confirmed via source: (1) Pattern exists — tabs.tsx:437-441 renders TabsPrimitive.Trigger without asChild, and Radix source (@radix-ui/react-tabs/dist/index.mjs) renders Primitive.button (native <button role="tab">); tabs.tsx:449-468 renders {inlineAction} inside that button in a span wrapper that only attaches stopPropagation handlers (no portal/sibling escape). The recommended usage in the JSDoc (tabs.tsx:418) and the production story (tabs.stories.tsx WithSuffix) place ItemInlineActionButton — a native <button> per item-anatomy.tsx:615 — inside, yielding button-in-button. (2) Behavior inference correct — Radix has no nested-interactive handling; the inner button keeps tabIndex 0 creating an extra Tab stop inside the tablist (violates APG single-tab-stop); stopPropagation only splits click behavior, not semantics; HTML forbids interactive descendants of button; axe nested-interactive (impact: serious) applies; role=tab accessible name from contents will absorb the inner aria-label="更多選項". Bonus hazard: any SSR/HTML-parse path would auto-close the outer button. (3) No accepted exception — tabs.spec.md only documents split-click intent; its A11y section (L306-319) even claims "0 critical violation" expected, contradicting reality. GitHub "Code ▾" / Linear split-tabs are indeed sibling elements. Severity P1 is appropriate: axe serious (not critical), no crash, but the defect is in the component's officially recommended API usage affecting keyboard/SR users.

confirmed.title: TreeView:multiple 模式自動 render 的 Checkbox 是 aria-hidden 但可聚焦的 Radix button
confirmed.detail: Radix Checkbox root 是 Primitive.button role=checkbox(@radix-ui/react-checkbox dist index.mjs:96-99),預設 tabIndex=0。TreeItem 傳 aria-hidden="true" 但沒傳 tabIndex=-1;外層 ItemPrefix 的 pointer-events-none 只擋滑鼠不擋鍵盤。結果:(a) axe aria-hidden-focus serious violation(focusable 元素對 AT 隱形);(b) 破壞 spec 明文的單一 tab stop 虛擬焦點模型(tree-view.spec.md:379)— Tab 會逐一停進每個 node 的隱形 checkbox。
confirmed.suggestion: auto-render 的 Checkbox 加 tabIndex={-1}(Checkbox 已支援 tabIndex passthrough),或改 render 純視覺 checkbox(non-interactive span 畫勾選態),選取語意已由 treeitem aria-selected 承載。

verdict.reason: Verified all three legs. (1) Pattern exists: tree-view.tsx:969-973 auto-renders <Checkbox aria-hidden="true"> without tabIndex in multiple mode; ItemPrefix pointer-events-none blocks mouse only, no inert anywhere. (2) Behavior correct: checkbox.tsx:259 tabIndex={effectiveReadOnly ? -1 : undefined} resolves undefined (TreeView passes no readOnly) and the {...props} spread carries aria-hidden but no tabIndex; Radix dist source (CheckboxTrigger) renders Primitive.button type=button role=checkbox with zero tabIndex/aria-hidden handling, so the non-disabled native button is focusable by default → focusable aria-hidden element = axe aria-hidden-focus serious violation. (3) Spec contradiction confirmed: tree-view.spec.md:372/379 mandates single tab stop with virtual focus (root tabIndex=0 at tree-view.tsx:627); the DS neutralizes rows (tabIndex=-1, :910) and chevron (tabIndex=-1 + aria-hidden, :870/880) but missed the checkbox — Tab stops on every node's AT-invisible checkbox, breaking the documented keyboard model for all multi-select consumers on the default auto-render path. P1 severity fits: serious a11y violation + broken documented interaction model, but no crash/data loss and arrow-key virtual focus still works (not P0).

confirmed.title: TreeView:draggable 時 dnd-kit attributes 把每個 row 注入 role="button" + tabIndex=0,破壞 tree 語意與單一 tab stop,且 Enter 可能作用在錯的 node
confirmed.detail: useDraggable 的 attributes 預設 { role:'button', tabIndex:0, aria-roledescription:'draggable' },TreeItem 直接 {...dragAttrs} spread 到 row div。draggable=true 時:(a) 每個 role=treeitem 內多一個 role=button 全 row wrapper,tree 結構語意被污染;(b) 每 row 變成 DOM tab stop,單一 tab stop 虛擬焦點(aria-activedescendant)模型全破;(c) DOM focus 停在某 row 上按 Enter/Space 會 bubble 到容器 handleKeyDown,但 handler 操作的是 state 的 focusedId(可能是另一個 node)→ 鍵盤啟動錯位;(d) sensors 只有 PointerSensor,這些 role/tabIndex 換不到任何鍵盤拖曳能力(無 KeyboardSensor),純負債。
confirmed.suggestion: useDraggable 傳 attributes 覆寫:{ role: undefined 或不 spread role, tabIndex: -1, roleDescription 保留 },只 spread listeners;若要鍵盤重排,另補 KeyboardSensor + APG tree 的 Ctrl+Arrow 慣例,而不是靠 dnd-kit 預設 attrs。

verdict.reason: Verified against source, could not refute. (1) tree-view.tsx:813-815 calls useDraggable without a custom attributes option; dnd-kit source confirms defaults role='button', tabIndex=0, aria-roledescription='draggable', plus aria-describedby pointing to keyboard-drag instructions. Line 957 spreads dragAttrs onto the inner full-row div inside role="treeitem" (line 902), so every row gains a role=button wrapper when draggable. (2) Single-tab-stop virtual focus is the component's own documented contract (comments at lines 285/609-610; container role=tree tabIndex=0 + aria-activedescendant lines 607-627, rows tabIndex=-1 line 910) — tabIndex=0 on every row breaks it. (3) No onFocus/focusin sync exists; container handleKeyDown resolves Enter/Space target from focusedId state (lines 526-527, 592-597), not event.target, so DOM-focusing a row via Tab then pressing Enter either no-ops or selects a stale different node — mis-targeting confirmed. (4) Sensors are PointerSensor-only (lines 304-305, 642) with no KeyboardSensor, and dragListeners contain only onPointerDown, so the injected role/tabIndex provide zero keyboard-drag capability — pure a11y debt. Radix offers no rescue: spec states tree ARIA is self-built (Radix has no Tree primitive). P1 severity is right: real a11y/keyboard defect violating the spec's APG model, but scoped to draggable=true with pointer interaction unaffected.

confirmed.title: Sidebar:icon-collapsed 模式 label display:none 後 SidebarMenuButton 完全沒有 accessible name(code 註解仍宣稱 SR 讀得到)
confirmed.fileLine: packages/design-system/src/components/Sidebar/sidebar.tsx:898(hidden 規則), 879-881(stale 註解), 1040-1047(content 組裝)
confirmed.detail: cva base 的 group-data-[collapsible=icon]:[&_[data-sidebar=menu-label]]:hidden 把 ItemLabel(item-anatomy.tsx:256-267)設 display:none;acc-name 計算排除 display:none 內容,icon 是 aria-hidden,SidebarMenuBadge 也 hidden → collapsed 時每個 menu button 對 SR 都是無名 button。tooltip 只在 open 時掛 describedby,不供名。而 879-881 的 v4 註解「label…a11y screen reader 仍讀到」在 v5 restore display:none 後已失真(doc-claim ≠ code,M32 類)。
confirmed.suggestion: collapsed 隱藏改 sr-only 化而非 display:none(label span 在 icon 模式套 sr-only class),或 ItemLabel 同步輸出 aria-label 到 button;並更新 879-881 註解。

verdict.reason: 全部三項驗證通過。(1) Pattern 真存在:sidebar.tsx:898 cva base 的 group-data-[collapsible=icon]:[&_[data-sidebar=menu-label]]:hidden 對 ItemLabel(item-anatomy.tsx:260-266 渲染 span[data-sidebar=menu-label])施加 display:none;content 組裝(sidebar.tsx:1040-1047)中 label 是 button 唯一文字來源。(2) 行為推論正確:ItemIcon 的 icon 帶 aria-hidden(item-anatomy.tsx:650),SidebarMenuBadge 同樣 group-data-[collapsible=icon]:hidden(sidebar.tsx:1180);accname spec 排除 display:none 子節點的 name-from-content;grep 證實 SidebarMenuButton 無 aria-label/sr-only fallback(aria-label 只在 SidebarTrigger:429/767);button 是 native button 非 Radix primitive,無內建救援;Tooltip 是標準 Radix Tooltip,只在 open 時掛 aria-describedby 且 description 不供 accessible name(sidebar.tsx:1111-1129)→ collapsed 時每個 menu button 對 SR 是無名 button,違 WCAG 4.1.2。(3) Stale 註解成立:sidebar.tsx:880「a11y screen reader 仍讀到」是 v4 outer-clip 架構宣稱,v5(line 894-898,2026-05-21)restore display:none 後已失真(M32 doc-claim ≠ code);且 line 897 稱「對齊 shadcn canonical」但 shadcn 是 overflow clip 保留 acc tree,display:none 反而偏離。Severity P1 合理:主導覽 collapsed 態 SR 全滅是 must-fix a11y 缺陷,但不影響視覺/滑鼠用戶且限 collapsed 模式,未達 P0。

confirmed.title: FileItem:hover-swap 的 Download/Retry button 鍵盤 focus 時仍 opacity-0(可聚焦但不可見),打破 spec 自己宣稱的鍵盤等價路徑
confirmed.detail: className 只有 opacity-0 group-hover/row:opacity-100 — 沒有 focus-visible:opacity-100 也沒消費 item-anatomy 已有的 group-has-[:focus-visible]/row reveal SSOT(item-anatomy.tsx:710)。spec:424 明文「keyboard user 直接 Tab 到列內 explicit 操作按鈕取得等價能力」,但 Tab 到這顆按鈕時它完全透明:使用者看到焦點消失在列中某處,passive 狀態 icon 也不讓位(它只在 group-hover 淡出)。這是機制缺陷不是 documented exception。
confirmed.suggestion: 按鈕 className 補 focus-visible:opacity-100,同時 passive icon 補 group-has-[:focus-visible]/row:opacity-0(直接改用 SUFFIX_HOVER_REVEAL_BY_GROUP.row 的既有 pattern 最一致)。

verdict.reason: Confirmed at all three cited locations. (1) file-item.tsx:176 — hover-swap Download/Retry Button className is only `absolute inset-0 opacity-0 group-hover/row:opacity-100 transition-opacity`; no focus-visible reveal anywhere in the file, and row wrappers (lines 247/291) have `group/row` but no focus handling. (2) The button is a native <button> in tab order (button.tsx:401, no tabIndex/aria-hidden at call site), and opacity-0 hides the element including its focus ring while the passive status icon stays visible (it only fades on group-hover) — keyboard focus is genuinely invisible = WCAG 2.4.7 failure. (3) item-anatomy.tsx:710 SSOT includes `group-has-[:focus-visible]/row:opacity-100` with an explicit comment (lines 717-721) that hover-reveal must also fire on keyboard focus-visible; FileItem hand-rolled a partial copy dropping the focus half — true M1/M23 drift, not a documented exception. (4) file-item.spec.md A11y section explicitly justifies no row-level focus with「keyboard user 直接 Tab 到列內 explicit 操作按鈕取得等價能力」and counts Download/retry among those buttons; no mouse-only exception is documented in the hover-swap section. Refutation attempts (Radix built-in handling, parent focus-within, documented exception) all failed. P1 stands: real broken keyboard path + AA a11y failure in a DS primitive, but not P0 since the action is still technically operable (Enter fires, SR users get aria-label) and remove via actions slot remains visible.

confirmed.title: Steps:expansion="multiple" 的可收合 step header(role=button)缺 aria-expanded / aria-controls
confirmed.detail: multiple 模式下點 header 會 toggleExpanded 展開/收合 StepContent,chevron 是 aria-hidden 純視覺(ItemSuffix aria-hidden),但 role="button" 的 header 沒有 aria-expanded,也沒 aria-controls 指向 content 區 → SR 使用者完全無法得知這是 disclosure、更不知道目前展開狀態。WAI-ARIA disclosure pattern 的最低要求就是 trigger 帶 aria-expanded。steps.spec.md 的 expansion 段沒把省略列為 documented exception。
confirmed.suggestion: StepItemHeader 在「expansion===multiple 且該 step 有 content」時輸出 aria-expanded={item.expanded} + aria-controls={contentId}(content div 補 id;follow-active 模式亦可同步輸出)。

verdict.reason: Verified by direct Read of steps.tsx: activate() (L355-362) toggles StepContent in expansion="multiple"; StepItemHeader (L450-473) renders role="button" with only aria-disabled + sr-only step-status span — rg confirms zero aria-expanded/aria-controls hits in the file; chevron (L509-519) is ItemSuffix aria-hidden; content (L491/522-527) is conditionally rendered with no id. Component is hand-rolled (imports: lucide/cva/cn/item-anatomy only — no Radix Collapsible), so nothing injects the ARIA state. steps.spec.md A11y section (L456-471) codifies only the Carbon ProgressIndicator model (which has no expandable content) and does not document the omission as an exception. SR users in multiple mode cannot perceive that the header is a disclosure nor its state — WCAG 4.1.2 / APG disclosure minimum (aria-expanded on trigger) violated. Minor nit: aria-controls is optional per APG, so aria-expanded is the hard half of the finding. P1 appropriate: real a11y defect, but scoped to opt-in expansion="multiple" mode (default follow-active unaffected), so not P0.

confirmed.title: Sidebar:Cmd/Ctrl+B 全域攔截無輸入框/組字/defaultPrevented guard — 已知 open issue 現況確認仍存在
confirmed.detail: 現況驗證:handler 只判斷 key==='b' && (metaKey||ctrlKey) 即 preventDefault + toggle。無 (a) event.target 是 input/textarea/contentEditable 的排除(在 SidebarInput 搜尋框或任何 rich-text editor 內按 Cmd+B 加粗 → sidebar 收合且 bold 被吃掉);(b) e.defaultPrevented 檢查(app 層 editor 已處理仍會 double-fire);(c) isComposing 檢查;(d) 無 opt-out prop。spec:688 已誠實文件化此限制(「目前無 opt-out prop、也未排除文字輸入框內」),此為承認的 gap 而非設計決策 — VS Code / Linear 同快捷鍵都排除可編輯 target。另 SidebarProvider 多實例會重複註冊、一次按鍵 toggle 兩次。
confirmed.suggestion: handler 開頭加:if (e.defaultPrevented || e.isComposing) return; const t = e.target as HTMLElement; if (t.closest('input,textarea,[contenteditable=true]')) return;並加 disableShortcut?: boolean prop 供 rich-text app opt-out。

verdict.reason: Confirmed at sidebar.tsx:191-203: window keydown handler checks only key==='b' && (metaKey||ctrlKey) then preventDefault + toggleSidebar. File-wide grep confirms no isComposing / defaultPrevented / editable-target guard and no opt-out prop (no disableShortcut anywhere). Not Radix-mediated — plain window listener, so no built-in mitigation; input/textarea/contentEditable keydowns bubble to window, meaning Cmd/Ctrl+B inside editors toggles the sidebar and suppresses native bold, and app-level editors that already handled the key double-fire. Multi-SidebarProvider double-registration also mechanically true (each instance adds its own window listener, no dedupe). sidebar.spec.md:688 wording「目前無 opt-out prop…也未排除文字輸入框內」confirms this is an acknowledged open gap, not a documented design decision. Minor caveat: the 'VS Code excludes editable targets' benchmark claim is imprecise (VS Code resolves via keybinding-context precedence), but this does not affect the verdict.

confirmed.title: Spreadsheet mode 鍵盤無法「進入」— 初始 cell selection 只能靠滑鼠 click 建立
confirmed.fileLine: packages/design-system/src/components/DataTable/data-table.tsx:1827(guard `selectedCellId != null`)+ 1523-1526(唯一 set 起點 = mouse click)+ 2385(tabIndex=0)
confirmed.detail: table outer 有 tabIndex=0,但 tableKeyboardHandler 的 spreadsheet 分支要求 `selectedCellId != null` 才處理方向鍵;而 selectedCellId 的唯一初始來源是 onEditableCellClick(mouse)。鍵盤-only 使用者 Tab 到 table 後按任何方向鍵都是 no-op,整個 spreadsheet 導覽被滑鼠 gate。這直接牴觸 data-table.spec.md L526 驗證宣稱「鍵盤完整可操作(無需滑鼠)」(spec L522-524 documented exception 只涵蓋 APG role=grid full model,不涵蓋「完全進不去」)。Excel / Google Sheets / AG Grid:容器獲得焦點時自動聚焦第一格。
